name: Easy Creamy Fudge
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Milk chocolate chips or semi-sweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart glass measure, combine marshmallows, condensed milk, and salt.
2. Microcook on HIGH for 3-4 minutes, stirring until the marshmallows melt and the mixture is smooth.
3. Add chocolate chips and stir until melted. (If you don't use marshmallows, melt the chocolate chips in the condensed milk with the salt.)
4. Stir in nuts and vanilla.
5. Line an 8 or 9-inch square pan with wax paper. Spread the fudge evenly in the pan.
6. Chill for 2 hours until firm.
7. Turn out onto a cutting board, peel off the paper, and cut into squares.
